text:
Once upon a time, there was a little squirrel named Stella. She loved apples. On Saturdays, she'd run over to her favorite orchard just to pick them. But one autumn day, she stumbled across something she'd never seen before.

A big old walnut shell was missing some pieces. And inside…it was pink. Stella tucked it into her bag.

Later that night, Stella had an accident. A branch crashed down, pulling her tail off. Tears wellned up. But then... she noticed something.

The pink patch!

She wasn.gdx? With care, Stella healed herself. But she wanted nothing more than to wear the shell.

She saved up money, trading in acorns. At last, she bought it.

Every Saturday morning. It was the weirdest thing.

Friends laughed. Enemies joked. But Stella just smiled. Because that pink thing wasn?

It was a symbol. Something hopeful. Something brave.
